title: Cycle-06 backup regression fix closure and stale-endpoint documentation sweep
description: Closed this session's remaining cycle-06 backup regressions, captured the finding-by-finding fix-check artifact, verified Dockerized test execution directly via compose, and removed the last stale endpoint reference found during this session's documentation sweep.

errors.error: Three backup unit tests failed around dump-failure handling and verify compatibility paths.
errors.cause: Backup execution attempted DB row-count collection after dump failure (masking root dump error), and verify logic was too strict for legacy/mixed manifests.
errors.fix: Updated backup flow to preserve SQL dump failure as primary error, added fallback row-count behavior when dump fails, and relaxed verify compatibility to accept legacy manifest-absent backups while still rejecting malformed manifests.

errors.error: Cycle-06 round-1 fix-check artifact was missing for this session's requested review.
errors.cause: Findings were reviewed and fixes were applied, but no persisted session report existed yet.
errors.fix: Created the round-1 fix-check report with per-finding status, static evidence, Dockerized test outcomes, and gate recommendation.

errors.error: A stale endpoint reference remained in the troubleshooting guide (`/api/alerts/:alertHistoryId/acknowledge`).
errors.cause: Documentation drift from earlier route contract updates.
errors.fix: Replaced the stale path with the current endpoint contract: `/api/alerts/:id/acknowledge` and re-ran legacy endpoint scans across docs.

errors.error: No session ledger entry existed for this cycle-06 backup regression closure work.
errors.cause: Session outcomes were completed before writing the corresponding bugfix ledger file.
errors.fix: Added this bugfix-12 record using the established bugfix session schema and limited scope to this session's fixes and validation.

rootCause: Failure-path hardening and verification-compatibility logic in backup handling lagged behind expected test behavior, plus one residual stale documentation endpoint remained from previous contract changes.
impact: Before this session closure, backup regressions caused failing unit tests and could obscure primary dump errors; documentation also contained one stale endpoint that could mislead operators.

validation.method: Dockerized test execution (compose direct commands, not run_tests.sh) plus documentation stale-endpoint pattern scans.
